data.title: 国际服愚人节特别礼物
data.summary: [Schale's April Fools Special Gift] Peroperopero! What a pero-worthy prank! 3 cheers for our idols!
data.body:
[Schale's April Fools Special Gift]

Peroperopero!
What a pero-worthy prank! 3 cheers for our idols!

Ya can have Pyroxene x1,200 gift to celebrate our gals' success, pero!
(Available until 4/8/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))
